label: Approximate NIH whole-heart preview anchors

coordinateNormalization.sourceCoordinateSystem: GLB native coordinates after V4-02 optimization; not patient-scale

anchors.label: Apex-forming ventricular tip
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate lowest ventricular tip on the whole-heart silhouette; not a segmented LV apex label.

anchors.label: Basal ventricular / outflow reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate superior/base region near great-vessel origins; exact valves and annuli are not labeled.

anchors.label: Septal area reference
anchors.approximationNote: Interior septal course is inferred from external form and educational model orientation, not source segmentation.

anchors.label: RV free-wall reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate anterior/right-sided ventricular surface; no source RV chamber label is present.

anchors.label: LV lateral wall reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate left/lateral ventricular silhouette; not validated against chamber segmentation.

anchors.label: Anterior ventricular wall reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate anterior surface point for orientation only; source mesh has no anterior-wall region id.

anchors.label: Inferior ventricular wall reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate inferior surface point from silhouette only; not a clinical inferior-wall localization.

anchors.label: Right atrial reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate atrial-side reference; source mesh does not label the right atrium.

anchors.label: Left atrial reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate atrial-side reference; source mesh does not label the left atrium.

anchors.label: Great-vessel outlet reference
anchors.approximationNote: Approximate superior vessel cluster used for orientation; individual vessels are not labeled.

educationalUseNotes: Anchors are approximate orientation landmarks for mapping authored educational regions onto the visual reference mesh. They are not clinically validated segmentation, measurement, or diagnostic labels.
